definition: To stop trying to do something
example: I gave up learning guitar after two weeks.

definition: To use all of something so there is none left
example: We ran out of milk so I need to go to the store.

definition: To understand or find a solution to something
example: It took me an hour to figure out how to fix the Wi-Fi.

definition: To have a friendly relationship with someone
example: She gets along with everyone in the office.
I keep putting off going to the dentist.

definition: 1. To refuse an offer 2. To reduce volume
example: He turned down the job offer because the salary was too low.

definition: To think of an idea or solution
example: We need to come up with a plan for the party.

definition: 1. To stop working (machine) 2. To separate into parts
example: My car broke down on the highway yesterday.

definition: To cancel an event that was planned
example: They called off the wedding at the last minute.

definition: 1. To search for information 2. To improve
example: If you dont know the word, just look it up online.

definition: 1. To introduce a topic 2. To raise a child
example: She brought up an interesting point during the meeting.

definition: To resemble a family member in appearance or character
example: You really take after your mother, same eyes and smile.

definition: To perform or complete a task or plan
example: The company carried out a survey among its employees.
Hold on a moment, Im almost ready.

definition: To indicate or draw attention to something
example: He pointed out several mistakes in the report.
